input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.2.2
            TITLE: the length of the section perpendicular to the front bulkhead may be a maximum of 25 mm

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.2.2: The length of the section perpendicular to the Front Bulkhead may be a maximum of 25 mm
F.7.2.2 The length of the section perpendicular to the Front Bulkhead may be a maximum of 25 mm 
measured from the rearmost face of the Front Bulkhead

final_answer: The length of the section perpendicular to the Front Bulkhead may be a maximum of 25 mm measured from the rearmost face of the Front Bulkhead
